name: daily-proto
description: Daily prototyping prompts powered by public APIs and data sources

scripts.build: tsc && cp -r src/data/catalog dist/data/ && cp -r src/data/open-data-index dist/data/ && cp src/data/open-data-endpoints.json dist/data/
scripts.seed: node scripts/seed-catalog.mjs && mkdir -p dist/data && cp -r src/data/catalog dist/data/
